review_title: Vision 6 is my favourite online platform
description: The bulk of my work is online so I use lots of different software and platforms. Vision 6 is by far the best because it runs smoothly, the support is fantastic, and the cost is very reasonable - three things that several other platforms definitely are not!
author: Nicky F.
pros: I like how Vision 6 has so many useful features, it runs fast and smoothly (no glitches etc), the support team is always so helpful, and the monthly cost is relatively small considering what we get and compared to other online platforms I use.
cons: It can be tricky ensuring the email messaging design and layout in Vision 6 translates exactly into Microsoft Outlook but I've managed to mostly overcome this through some trial and error over the years. Because it has many features, it also takes time and commitment to learn how get the most out of Vision 6 but it's truly worth the effort.

review_title: Vision6 provides the best campaign sending experience in Australia
description: Simply a reliable campaign sending tool with all the tools and features you need, with friendly customer support to boot.
author: Paul M.
pros: Vision6 are locally based on Australian shores. My clients require their sample, data, etc. to be local to satisfy ISO standards. The Vision6 software / platform is safe and secure. For campaign sending, it has all the features and information one needs. Their reports provide detailed insights in to the campaign performance. And when you are not using your Vision6 account, you can pause it. Their customer support people are also helpful and friendly.
cons: When the sample record counts get high, the prices go up considerably. I have used other campaign sending software and the costs are far lower.

description: I have been using for about one year They keep chargig over $250 per month for contact number. I did not do anything such as send and email or sms. Very poor notification system. just keep charge the money money money.
author: Andy L.
pros: There is no good things. everythig is bad. Nothing
cons: They will charge you only the number of contact lists Even if make a mistake.

description: Overall, Vision6 has empowered us to streamline our marketing communications, save time, and achieve professional results with ease.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We can design, send, and track email campaigns quickly, without relying on developers to build or troubleshoot. The drag-and-drop editor is straightforward, and the reporting dashboards give us clear insights into performance without needing complex data tools.
cons: I wish Vision 6 has more off the shelf integrations with CRMs, however the Zapier integrations seem to work quite well and it quick to set up.

description: Overall, its a great marketing tool, easy to use and very intuitive. Additionally great support when needed
author: Sarah B.
pros: Ease of use, very intuitive interface. A great product for sending bulk emails, the backend and dashboard are great.
cons: Would like more iPad functionality which I get around using the desktop version. Also the option to be able to cut and paste contacts

review_title: Have recommended and will continue to recommend
description: A great overall experience with Vision6. I have recommended it and will continue to recommend it to anyone looking for a simple and effective way to get your organisations' communications across.
author: Friedel M.
pros: Easy to use once you know how to navigate the platform. The Vision6 team are very helpful and friendly, quickly responding to requests. It produces really sleek newsletters that we often receive compliments on.
cons: It took a little while to get across how to use the platform, at times feeling like you need to click a lot to get the option you need, but once you've got your bearings it's quite straightforward.

review_title: Vision6 a valuable tool for my new business
description: As a business owner in the automotive equipment industry, I've been using Vision6 weekly for my email marketing needs, and it has become an invaluable tool for my business. The platform seamlessly integrates with our existing Outlook and Xero systems, making it incredibly efficient for managing our customer communications. What truly stands out is Vision6's robust reporting capabilities. The detailed analytics from our mail-outs provide clear insights into campaign performance, helping us understand what resonates with our audience. This data-driven approach has been instrumental in building and maintaining our customer base. The platform's reliability is exceptional, and the user interface makes it easy to create and schedule regular campaigns. I particularly appreciate how it helps us maintain consistent communication with our automotive workshop and dealership partners. The segmentation features allow us to target specific customer groups effectively, which is crucial in our industry where different businesses have varying equipment needs. For any Australian business looking for a reliable email marketing solution, Vision6 delivers exceptional value. Their local support and understanding of the Australian market make them stand out from other providers. The platform has significantly contributed to our business growth and customer engagement strategy
author: mark G.
pros: The ease of use, the report system allowing you to see who opens and click in your emails. The database growth.
cons: The email is sent in picture form so receiving need to download picture to read your email. If auto download then great.

description: Positive experience and intuitive email marketing platform. Also great local support with fast response times.
author: Manisha K.
pros: I work in marketing and have used a bunch of email tools over the years, but Vision6 has easily been one of the best. It's super intuitive — building emails, creating forms, pulling reports, it’s all really straightforward. I also love that their support team is based in Australia. They’re quick to respond and actually helpful (which isn’t always the case with other platforms!). Overall, it just makes my job easier. Would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for an easy-to-use email marketing platform.
cons: More marketing automation features like creating email journeys as sophisticated as other robust platforms like Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

description: I've been using Vision6 for 10+ years. It's a user friendly system to work on, track our email campaigns and stay connected with our clients. I always feel supported knowing that Vision6 is an Australian owned company, and help is readily available.
author: Simone S.
pros: - User friendly - Efficient method to track our email campaigns - Cost effective way to stay connected with our clients - Local support - Australian owned
cons: Nothing comes to mind at present. I'm imagine there are more functions for me to use within Vision6, that I'm yet to find.

description: We have been using Vision 6 for over 10 years. We generally send about 10,000 emails per month. They have been the ideal partner. I cannot recommend Vision 6 more highly.
author: David B.
pros: The ability to customise the look and feel of each broadcast is superb. The reporting on multiple factors, opens, bounces and unsubscribes has been invaluable as well as their ability to analyze performance metrics and manage the overall process. I use it mainly to automate the timing of broadcasts.
cons: I have no criticism of this app. It has always worked as expected and we have never had a glitch....

description: As someone who handles communications for a large organization with a global footprint, I rely heavily on Vision 6 for all our internal communications. This platform excels in its user-friendly design, efficient list and contact management, and seamless email creation and distribution. Whether for internal updates or external campaigns, Vision 6 simplifies the entire process. In my experience, it stands out even when compared to competitors like Mailchimp. Highly recommended for any email marketing needs!
author: Emily S.
pros: Simplicity and user friendly interface.
cons: There is nothing to comment here, I like the platform and strongly recommend it.

description: Easy. "Well we can always use vision6 to do it".
author: Jeewon A.
pros: Easy for anyone to pick up and use. New staff can start using with short training and learning on the job. Template system is very useful.
cons: Would really like to be able to group lists so that sending can be streamlined and footer unsub etc. links can be unified instead of having to individually create a setting for every single list.

description: Easy-to-use, SPAM compliant, bug-free and reliable
author: Michelle S.
pros: The software is easy-to-use and doesn't have bugs and in the more than 10 years I have had an account, I can't remember the system ever going down!

review_title: Great product that allows me to effectively engage with my clients.
description: I like being able to send my clients a nice looking email, that is still from me but easier to manage. Its also great to be see who is opening my emails and when.
author: Duncan A.
pros: I love the embedded forms and ease of use of the design of the emails. The layout is easy to use and understand once you get to know it.
cons: I think it is very important to have extra functionality around collecting big data on my contacts. Reporting functions that look at all my emails rather than by campaign only. ie. Being able to drill down but across emails, who always opens my emails, who never opens my emails so that I can target specific campaigns to specific people based on how they respond to emails. Another example. John smith always reads his emails at 6am, so I should be targeting him at that time to best get his attention. Also need A/B marketing campaign functions.

review_title: Sophisticated, easy to use, intuitive software that gets real results
author: Paul M.
pros: I have been a long time fan of the Vision6 drag and drop editor - it is intuitive and simple to use with new features regularly added to speed up email design and creation. However, what really sets the Vision6 platform apart is the contact management.
cons: The software is designed for the sophisticated marketer so while it's easy to use the features are a bit advanced.

review_title: Best Software and Customer Service i ever received in Email Marketing Softwares
description: Five Star Experience as a user
author: Alex B.
pros: Easy to use, efficient software and their customer service is cream on top! Very responsive and professional team. I have used Mailchimp and Convert kit before will recommend Vision 6 any day!
cons: There isn't anything that I don't like about Vision 6 yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nithiya B.
pros: Fantastic real-time reporting that enables strong data to analyse Ability to schedule emails Good integration options, great customer service and price I believe it is an Aussie company - helps with privacy rules
cons: Not much. But I wish elements such as the Spacer or the Button can be copied from one email to another.

review_title: This has saved us a lot of time from our old manual processes
description: Tim saving. Don't have to worry about managing opt out and closed email addresses
author: Jason H.
pros: The database and mailing lists are very easy to manage and we like the feature where bouncebacks are automatically taken off the active list
cons: For non IT people sometimes understanding the various formats (eg HTML etc) can be difficult. It would be good to just be able to drop text in and have the formatting stay the same as it was in word

description: Excellent.
author: Tara M.
pros: Ease of use and functions. Great method for communicating to group teams.
cons: To be picky, I would say navigating way around is a little overwhelming as there is lots of info.

description: I have worked with Vision6 for many years through a number of employers. They have been a great help in both managing our monthly mailouts and providing support/guidance whenever we hit a roadblock.
author: Sam G.
pros: - The ease of creating email templates - Great support - Onshore - Keeping me updated on any expected changes within the market that may impact deliverables
cons: Support turnaround times could be quicker, however the end result is typically a positive one.

description: Great newsletter layouts, easy to use , I love the opening reports which are easy to read. You can create events and link newsletters to almost anywhere
author: Natalie A.
pros: The one to one training on sign up was so personable. They made sure you got it completely. It’s so easy to use and I love the layouts
cons: There’s nothing I don’t like it is all so well laid out and easy to use. I am happy with this product.

review_title: Powerful, User-Friendly Email Marketing Tool with Great Reporting
author: Alana G.
pros: I really enjoy using Vision 6! The software is incredibly easy to use and offers fantastic flexibility, but what truly stands out is the level of reporting it provides. It allows me to refine my communications effectively and see immediately what works and what doesn’t.
cons: The only downside for me is that there’s no integration with my current work software to streamline contact list updates, but I recognise this is more of a “me” problem than an issue with the platform itself.

description: Amazing. A fantastic tool for my business.
author: Wendy L.
pros: Vision6 is so easy to use. It is a great email marketing tool.
cons: Nothing to dislike. I am terrible with computers but do great email marketing campaigns through Vision6.

review_title: Powerful yet easy to use platform
description: Fantastic! Great program. I've used it for years and I can't recommend it enough.
author: Michael G.
pros: Vision6 has am easy to use drop and drag user interface, which allows for seamless creation of Newsletters. It's easy to understand and powerful enough to create immersive designs.
cons: HTML and text can be a bit clunky when trying to work with text boxes, but other than it's great.

review_title: Intuitive, easy to use emailing platform
description: Great, been using for around 5 years now.
author: Geoff B.
pros: Simple, easy to use, and great reporting, plus they are always developing the product and adding new features. Deliverability
cons: exporting some data can be trickey, lead scoring would be great.
